payload.answer: Which Brutto did you mean: the restaurant in London or the article alias?
citations: Existing: Brutto restaurant in London; Brutto article alias. New note: Brutto was better than expected.

entity_resolution.reason: The note 'Brutto was better than expected' does not uniquely identify which existing Brutto entity it refers to. It could refer to the Brutto restaurant in London or the Brutto article alias, so committing it to either entity would risk misattribution.

details: No durable memory was committed because the entity reference is ambiguous.

repair_options: Attach the note to Brutto restaurant in London.
Attach the note to the Brutto article alias.
Keep the note uncommitted until clarified.
